entity.summary: Vietnam-based crypto exchange and direct-swap service founded by a Vietnamese-German team, offering wallet-settled swaps across crypto and VND methods together with OTC and ATM services.
entity.notes: The first-party platform states that the company was founded in late 2013 and has operated without interruption since 2014. HEI uses 2014-01-01 as a year-level service-start marker because an exact public launch day was not recovered. Current swap activity, VND settlement methods, OTC, and ATM services support active status.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN official exchange platform
evidence.notes: First-party platform exposes current wallet-settled crypto swaps, VND bank and cash methods, account access, OTC, ATM, API, and recent trade activity.

evidence.title: BitcoinVN About Us
evidence.notes: First-party company history states that BitcoinVN was founded in late 2013 by a Vietnamese-German team and has provided exchange services since 2014.
